final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original brand color and typography guideline poster for 染秋 (RAN QIU), an autumn-inspired fragrance brand rooted in Eastern philosophy.

Style/medium: editorial brand guideline poster, clean modern layout with subtle Eastern aesthetic, grid-based composition, Behance portfolio style
Subject: color swatches and typography specimens for 染秋 fragrance brand, featuring primary and secondary colors inspired by autumn botanicals
Composition: vertical poster format with top section for brand name, middle section for color palette swatches, bottom section for typography specimens, generous white space
Color palette: warm terracotta and persimmon orange as primary, amber and golden yellow as secondary, deep charcoal for text, cream paper background
Text (verbatim): "染秋" "RAN QIU" "桂花乌龙" "琥珀枫叶" "柿霜暮色"
Constraints: color swatches must show hex codes; typography must display both Chinese characters and Latin alphabet; layout must be scalable for print and digital use
Avoid: generic gradient backgrounds; western floral motifs; overly decorative elements; neon colors; 8K stuffer aesthetic
